title: Prepare a working sample
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare a working sample demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Receive submitted sample

pcs.text: Receive submitted sample and verify documentation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Receive submitted sample and verify documentation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Receive submitted sample and verify documentation.

pcs.text: Assess sample for compliance with documentation and laboratory standards and report inconsistencies to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess sample for compliance with documentation and laboratory standards and report inconsistencies to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess sample for compliance with documentation and laboratory standards and report inconsistencies to supervisor.

pcs.text: Label sample and update records according to workplace procedures and industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Label sample and update records according to workplace procedures and industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Label sample and update records according to workplace procedures and industry standards.

pcs.text: Prepare submitted sample for testing according to timeframes specified in workplace procedures and documentation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare submitted sample for testing according to timeframes specified in workplace procedures and documentation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare submitted sample for testing according to timeframes specified in workplace procedures and documentation.

pcs.text: Handle and store submitted sample according to workplace procedures and industry specifications for species
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle and store submitted sample according to workplace procedures and industry specifications for species?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle and store submitted sample according to workplace procedures and industry specifications for species.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Receive submitted sample

elements.title: Reduce sample

pcs.text: Check working area and equipment is clean and free of contaminants
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check working area and equipment is clean and free of contaminants?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check working area and equipment is clean and free of contaminants.

pcs.text: Identify and use equipment suitable for dividing samples according to workplace procedures and industry specifications for species

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and use equipment suitable for dividing samples according to workplace procedures and industry specifications for species.

pcs.text: Reduce sample size to equal or greater than required working sample according to workplace and industry procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Reduce sample size to equal or greater than required working sample according to workplace and industry procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Reduce sample size to equal or greater than required working sample according to workplace and industry procedures.

pcs.text: Package working sample for testing according to procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Package working sample for testing according to procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Package working sample for testing according to procedures.

pcs.text: Update sample labelling and records according to workplace procedures and industry specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Update sample labelling and records according to workplace procedures and industry specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Update sample labelling and records according to workplace procedures and industry specifications.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Reduce sample

elements.title: Store working sample after testing

pcs.text: Receive tested samples and verify records and labels before storing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Receive tested samples and verify records and labels before storing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Receive tested samples and verify records and labels before storing.

pcs.text: Handle samples according to workplace guidelines where live insects have been detected before storage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle samples according to workplace guidelines where live insects have been detected before storage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle samples according to workplace guidelines where live insects have been detected before storage.

pcs.text: Store samples after testing in environmental conditions that minimise changes in seed quality traits
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store samples after testing in environmental conditions that minimise changes in seed quality traits?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store samples after testing in environmental conditions that minimise changes in seed quality traits.
